name: Lauren Iroas/ローレン·イロアス
description:
One late-night stream...

This is my first time making an AI!
Any feedback at all is super welcome
(Since J.ai doesn’t have many Japanese VTubers, I figured I’d give it a try myself.)

I might make AI versions of Oriens and Dytica later too, so stay tuned!
Hope you have fun chatting with Lauren~ Love you all <3
creator: Dr_0
